html.h4: Filters: NFO hostname - $nfo_hostname$ | Device group - $exp_group$ | Device - $exp_ip$

search.query: `netflow_search_rule_20067` | head 1 | addinfo | eval selection_duration=strftime(info_min_time, "%m/%d/%Y %I:%M:%S %p") . " - " . strftime(info_max_time, "%m/%d/%Y %I:%M:%S %p") | table selection_duration

| `dedup_timechart_events` | eventstats latest(src_host) as l_src_host by nfo_hostname exp_ip src_ip | `format_ip_column(src_ip_string, src_ip, l_src_host)` | `per_second_chart(sum(sum_bytes_in) by src_ip_string,"$span_token$",$span_int$)`

| eventstats latest(src_host) as l_src_host by nfo_hostname exp_ip src_ip | bin _time $span_token$ | stats sum(sum_bytes_in) as sumbytes sum(sum_packets_in) as sumpacketsin sum(sum_flow_count) as sumflowcount by nfo_hostname exp_ip sum_by_exp src_ip l_src_host _time
| eval avgbits= sumbytes*8/$span_int$ | stats sum(sumbytes) as TrafficAmount sum(sumpacketsin) as PacketsAmount sum(sumflowcount) as Connections max(avgbits) as MaxTraffic by nfo_hostname exp_ip src_ip l_src_host | sort 0 - TrafficAmount | head 20 | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval PacketsSpeed=(PacketsAmount)/$range$ | eval TrafficSpeed=AverageSpeed/1000000 | eval TrafficAmount=TrafficAmount/1024/1024 | eval MaxTraffic=MaxTraffic/1000000 | `commas_formatting(Avg Mbps, TrafficSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Traffic MB, TrafficAmount, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Max Mbps, MaxTraffic, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Avg Packets/s, PacketsSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Packets, PacketsAmount)` | `commas_formatting(Total Conns, Connections)` | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | table nfo_hostname exp_ip_name src_ip l_src_host "Max Mbps" "Avg Mbps" "Total Traffic MB" "Avg Packets/s" "Total Packets" "Total Conns" | rename nfo_hostname as "NFO" | rename exp_ip_name as "Device" | rename src_ip as "Source IP" | rename l_src_host as "Source Host"

html.p: You see this message because there is no data for the selected Time Range or the App Setup is not completed.

This dashboard is populated by NetFlow Optimizer (NFO) Logic Module “10067: Top Traffic Monitor” (syslogs with nfc_id=20067). This Module identifies hosts with the most traffic. It consolidates NetFlow records over a period of time (Data Collection Interval) which all have the same combination of the following fields: Source IP address, Destination IP address, Source port number, Destination port number, Layer 3 protocol, Input interface, Output interface. This Module is packaged in NFO “Network Traffic and Devices Monitor” Module Set.
Please either change the Time Range or make sure that this NFO Logic Module is enabled. See NSO Configuration for more details.
